name: igv
when_to_use: 需要在一个 locus 上探索基因组数据——read pileup/coverage(BAM/CRAM)、变异(VCF)、bigWig 信号、基因模型——多条 track 坐标锁定堆叠、可 pan/zoom 并支持 locus 搜索时用它;提供 genome id + 各 track 的 url/数据对象。它是重型 component,只在真需要一个 genome browser 时用;静态基因示意图用 seqviz(单序列)/ideogram(染色体总览)。
why_valuable: 一个可嵌入的完整 genome browser:参考序列 + 坐标锁定的多 track 堆叠、read pileup、coverage、跨 track 坐标滚动,是应用级 notation;原生 AI 无法手写坐标换算、pileup 排布与多 track 同步,徒手只能画静态基因框。

data_in.note: 这是 igv 原生 config:genome 是 genome-id 字符串(如 'hg38')或参考对象;每个 track 必须给 url;type/format 缺省按扩展名推断,BAM/CRAM/tabix 类需 indexURL。

schema.genome: string —— genome id,如 'hg38'/'hg19'/'mm10';或 { id, fastaURL, indexURL } 参考对象
schema.locus?: string —— 初始定位,如 'chr8:127,736,588-127,739,371';默认基因组起点

tracks.url: string —— 数据文件 URL(必填,除非用自定义 reader)

spec.note: igv 读取容器 width 自建可滚动 browser 布局、随 track 数自管内部高度;容器只需给 width(如 100%),禁 vh/百分比高。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:document 上下文中 igv 自注 CSS 到 head 可正常工作
carriers.widget: conditional:igv 自注 CSS 到 document.head,不跨 shadow 边界,widget 内会失样式——非首选载体
carriers.codex: supported:ESM 默认导出 + createBrowser,无 worker/wasm 硬依赖(远端数据经 fetch)

isolation.evidence: API correct: dist/igv.esm.min.js exports single default (V9 as default); README pins `import igv from '.../dist/igv.esm.min.js'` and `igv.createBrowser(parentDiv, config)` returns a Promise<Browser> (grep of esm confirms `createBrowser(parentDiv, config)`); config genome/locus/tracks are the documented shape. globalStyleInjection=yes: esm contains document.head (x3) + createElement('style') (x2) + adoptedStyleSheets (x1) + document.styleSheets (x1) — igv self-injects its stylesheet into the top document, so a shadow-hosted instance renders unstyled. globalDomMutation=yes: builds a large browser DOM inside the container plus popovers. globalEvents=yes: resize/pointer listeners for pan/zoom. shadowCompatible=conditional: renders into the provided container, but the head-injected CSS does not cross the shadow boundary — artifact/codex (document context) are the clean carriers. Heavy component. confidence medium.

en.when_to_use: Use it to explore genomic data at a locus, including read pileup/coverage (BAM/CRAM), variants (VCF), bigWig signals, and gene models, with coordinate-locked stacked tracks, pan/zoom, and locus search. Provide a genome id plus each track's url/data object. It is a heavy component, so use it only when you truly need a genome browser; for a static genomic diagram use seqviz for a single sequence or ideogram for a chromosome overview.
en.why_valuable: This is a complete embeddable genome browser: reference sequence, coordinate-locked stacked tracks, read pileup, coverage, and coordinate scrolling synchronized across tracks. It is application-level notation; AI cannot handwrite coordinate transforms, pileup layout, or multi-track synchronization and can only draw static gene boxes.

data_in.note: This is native igv config: genome is a genome-id string such as 'hg38' or a reference object; every track must provide url. type/format is inferred from the extension when omitted, and BAM/CRAM/tabix formats require indexURL.

schema.genome: string -- Genome id such as 'hg38'/'hg19'/'mm10', or a { id, fastaURL, indexURL } reference object
schema.locus?: string -- Initial location such as 'chr8:127,736,588-127,739,371'; defaults to the start of the genome

tracks.url: string -- Data-file URL (required unless using a custom reader)
tracks.type?: string -- 'alignment' | 'variant' | 'wig' | 'annotation' | 'seg' | 'interact' ...; inferred from format by default
tracks.format?: string -- 'bam' | 'cram' | 'vcf' | 'bigwig' | 'bed' | 'gff3' ...; inferred from the extension by default

spec.note: igv reads container width and creates a scrollable browser layout, managing internal height according to track count. The container only needs a width such as 100%; vh and percentage heights are forbidden.
